interactions.stageContent: {"slideOutline":[{"slideNumber":1,"title":"Company Overview","purpose":"Introduce AtlusDeck and establish credibility in the AI-powered sales enablement space"},{"slideNumber":2,"title":"The Challenge","purpose":"Frame Meridian Dynamics' current proposal bottleneck and its impact on revenue"},{"slideNumber":3,"title":"Our Approach","purpose":"Present the AI-driven proposal automation methodology with human-in-the-loop quality gates"},{"slideNumber":4,"title":"Key Capabilities","purpose":"Highlight template management, content assembly, and Google Workspace integration"},{"slideNumber":5,"title":"Success Metrics","purpose":"Share quantified outcomes: 95% faster turnaround, 20% engagement lift, 4x capacity"},{"slideNumber":6,"title":"Implementation Timeline","purpose":"Outline the pilot-to-production path aligned with Meridian's Q2 timeline"},{"slideNumber":7,"title":"Next Steps","purpose":"Propose a live demo and pilot kickoff schedule"}]}
